<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:pulumi:test::test::pulumi:pulumi:Stack::test]

<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%reset%}>  pkgA:m:typA: (same)

<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>    [provider=urn:pulumi:test::test::pulumi:providers:pkgA::provider::2449c798-da6b-4a2a-8646-46348f86ca36]
